nodes.name: Get Courses
nodes.notes: Fetches all courses from Moodle via Web Services API.

nodes.name: Filter Courses
nodes.notes: Filters out site course (id=1). If MOODLE_COURSE_IDS env var is set, only keeps those course IDs.

nodes.name: Loop Courses
nodes.notes: Iterates over courses one at a time.

nodes.name: Get Course Contents
nodes.notes: Fetches all sections, modules, and file resources for the current course.

nodes.name: Extract Files
nodes.notes: Parses course contents response, extracts downloadable files with supported MIME types, normalizes namespace from course shortname.

nodes.name: Dedup & Diff
nodes.notes: Compares current Moodle files against stored state in workflow static data. Classifies files as new, updated, removed, or unchanged.

nodes.name: Has Deletions?
nodes.notes: Checks if there are files to delete from Vektra (removed from Moodle).

nodes.name: Prepare Deletions
nodes.notes: Prepares deletion payloads and removes entries from static data state.

nodes.name: DELETE Removed Docs
nodes.notes: Calls DELETE /api/v1/documents/batch to remove documents that no longer exist in Moodle. Requires admin scope.

nodes.name: Has Ingestions?
nodes.notes: Checks if there are new or updated files to ingest.

nodes.name: Split Ingest Items
nodes.notes: Splits the toIngest array into individual items for processing.

nodes.name: Check Update Delete
nodes.notes: For updated files, flags that old document must be deleted before re-ingesting.

nodes.name: DELETE Old Version
nodes.notes: Deletes old version of an updated file before re-ingesting.

nodes.name: Download File
nodes.notes: Downloads the file from Moodle using the fileurl (from Check Update Delete) + WS token.

nodes.name: Prepare Upload
nodes.notes: Renames binary data key to 'data' and sets the unique filename for the multipart upload. Carries forward metadata.

nodes.name: POST /ingest
nodes.notes: Uploads file to Vektra ingest API. Returns 200 (sync) or 202 (async for large files).

nodes.name: Track Poll Count
nodes.notes: Limits polling to 60 iterations (5 minutes). Changes status to 'timeout' when exceeded.

nodes.name: Update State
nodes.notes: Stores file-to-document_id mapping in workflow static data for dedup tracking. Only updates on successful ingestion.

nodes.name: Ingestion Summary
nodes.notes: Aggregates results from all courses and produces a summary.

nodes.name: No Changes
nodes.notes: Passes through unchanged file info when there is nothing to ingest.
